requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety and Island Deployment Durability
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2安全及海岛部署耐久性
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2安全及海島部署耐久性

summary.en: Solar PV inverters supplied to Antigua and Barbuda should be documented against IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 safety requirements for power converters used in photovoltaic systems. ABBS standards review, APUA grid-connection review, project-owner specifications, and international lender procurement may also require evidence for outdoor enclosure rating, thermal derating, surge protection, corrosion protection, and installation suitability. Antigua and Barbuda's hurricane exposure, coastal salt-mist environment, and sea-freight supply chain through St John's make mechanical mounting, IP rating, anti-corrosion treatment, spare-parts planning, and packaging documentation practical safety and reliability issues.
summary.zh: 供应至安提瓜和巴布达的太阳能光伏逆变器应按照IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2光伏系统用功率变换器安全要求准备文件。ABBS标准审查、APUA并网审查、项目业主规格和国际贷款方采购还可能要求户外外壳等级、热降额、浪涌保护、防腐蚀和安装适用性证据。安提瓜和巴布达面临飓风暴露、沿海盐雾环境以及经圣约翰港的海运供应链，机械安装、IP等级、防腐处理、备件规划和包装文件均是实际安全和可靠性问题。
summary.zht: 供應至安地卡及巴布達的太陽能光伏逆變器應按照IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2光伏系統用功率轉換器安全要求準備文件。ABBS標準審查、APUA併網審查、項目業主規格和國際貸款方採購還可能要求戶外外殼等級、熱降額、浪湧保護、防腐蝕和安裝適用性證據。安地卡及巴布達面臨颶風暴露、沿海鹽霧環境以及經聖約翰港的海運供應鏈，機械安裝、IP等級、防腐處理、備件規劃和包裝文件均是實際安全和可靠性問題。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
ABBS standards and conformity context for electrical products where applicable
APUA project-specific installation and commissioning acceptance where applicable

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter safety evidence often relies on GB/T 37408-2021 and NB/T 32004 test documentation, supported by CNAS-accredited laboratory reports and voluntary CQC / CGC certification where obtained. These Chinese documents are not automatically accepted as IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence for Antigua and Barbuda projects. China domestic test assumptions may also not cover Antigua and Barbuda's continuous marine humidity, salt mist, hurricane wind exposure, or higher 230/400 V nominal grid voltage.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器安全证据通常基于GB/T 37408-2021和NB/T 32004测试文件，并可辅以CNAS认可实验室报告以及已取得的自愿性CQC / CGC认证。这些中国文件不会被安提瓜和巴布达项目自动接受为IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证据。中国国内测试假设也可能未覆盖安提瓜和巴布达持续海洋湿度、盐雾、飓风风载暴露或更高的230/400 V标称电网电压。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器安全證據通常基於GB/T 37408-2021和NB/T 32004測試文件，並可輔以CNAS認可實驗室報告以及已取得的自願性CQC / CGC認證。這些中國文件不會被安地卡及巴布達項目自動接受為IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證據。中國國內測試假設也可能未覆蓋安地卡及巴布達持續海洋濕度、鹽霧、颶風風載暴露或更高的230/400 V標稱電網電壓。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: China GB/T / NB/T safety evidence should be supplemented with IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certificates for the exact inverter model or family. For Antigua and Barbuda, exporters should also document environmental derating, corrosion resistance, surge protection, mounting integrity, and spare-parts / warranty support for hurricane-prone coastal operation. Sea-freight through St John's can add packaging, corrosion-prevention, and customs-documentation requirements that are not addressed by a China domestic inverter certificate.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T / NB/T安全证据应补充特定逆变器型号或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证书。针对安提瓜和巴布达，出口商还应记录飓风多发沿海运行所需的环境降额、防腐蚀、浪涌保护、安装强度以及备件 / 保修支持。经圣约翰港海运可能带来包装、防腐和海关文件要求，这些并非中国国内逆变器证书所覆盖。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T / NB/T安全證據應補充特定逆變器型號或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證書。針對安地卡及巴布達，出口商還應記錄颶風多發沿海運行所需的環境降額、防腐蝕、浪湧保護、安裝強度以及備件 / 保固支援。經聖約翰港海運可能帶來包裝、防腐和海關文件要求，這些並非中國國內逆變器證書所覆蓋。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent but commonly mandatory in practice where ABBS, APUA, project owners, insurers, or lenders require IEC safety evidence and site-suitability documentation
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or certification-program dependent under China domestic PV inverter certification; GB/T and NB/T evidence is not automatically accepted as IEC 62109 evidence

source.publisher: Antigua and Barbuda Bureau of Standards (ABBS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A China GB/T or NB/T inverter file should not be treated as sufficient IEC 62109 safety evidence for Antigua and Barbuda. Prepare IEC 62109-1/-2 certificates, confirm ABBS and APUA project documentation needs, and document hurricane, salt-mist, surge, mounting, and logistics controls before shipment through St John's.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应将中国GB/T或NB/T逆变器文件视为足以满足安提瓜和巴布达IEC 62109安全证据。应准备IEC 62109-1/-2证书，确认ABBS和APUA项目文件需求，并在经圣约翰港出货前记录飓风、盐雾、浪涌、安装和物流控制措施。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應將中國GB/T或NB/T逆變器文件視為足以滿足安地卡及巴布達IEC 62109安全證據。應準備IEC 62109-1/-2證書，確認ABBS和APUA項目文件需求，並在經聖約翰港出貨前記錄颶風、鹽霧、浪湧、安裝和物流控制措施。
